_comment: Cross-stack contract fixture (todo.md > Cross-cutting). Winner maps are keyed by a conflict's subject string (recipe id / tag id). The backend derives it from a jar data path (_recipe_id_from_path / _tag_id_from_path) and stores it in detail.recipe / detail.tag; the front re-reads it via conflictSubject(). Both must produce the SAME string. The backend test (test_subject_keys.py) pins derive(path) == subject; the front test (conflicts.test.ts) pins conflictSubject({detail}) == subject. Same `subject` values here lock the two together.
